known_gaps.label: magicTile11_waterwarp_room9_14_split
known_gaps.description: Room (9,14) has TWO different water-warp sub-exits from magicTile[11], distinguished by char x-position (<=420 -> east--, >420 -> north++), not captured here since override regex only matches a plain 2-clause north==X && east==Y condition. Needs manual entry if this room's water-warp is to be included in the shuffle.
